hypothesis: Mutating position 5 to aromatic residues (W/F/Y) will enhance complementarity with SSTR2-specific ECL2/ECL3/TM5/TM6 regions, while mutating position 11 to hydrophobic residues (L/I/V) will reduce off-target SSTR3/SSTR5 interactions, thereby increasing selectivity margin.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving good selectivity (Δmargin > 0), but structural quality remains a critical failure mode. The next iteration should focus on improving structural validity while maintaining selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Low pass rate suggests insufficient sampling. Increasing the number of candidates improves the chances of generating structurally valid designs.
Structural failures likely stem from poor clash resolution. Tightening the clash threshold will enforce better geometry and improve pLDDT scores.
